title: RGCS time-series file descriptor
description: Describes one stored time-series data file (CSV or Parquet) and binds it to a run by sha256. CSV convention: UTF-8, one header row, column names with unit suffixes, no comment lines; time column 't_s' is seconds from acquisition start.

file.description: Path relative to the run manifest.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the file bytes; the provenance anchor.

channel_ids.description: Which acquisition channels this file carries (must exist in acquisition.channels).

run_index.description: 0-based shot index within the n_runs ensemble; omit for single-file-per-run layouts.

t0_s.description: Time of first sample relative to the run trigger (default 0).
